description: Cycles intermittently fail to commit: prior cycles ran git/file-writes as root via sudo, leaving .git/objects fan-out dirs + assets/ root-owned -> 'insufficient permission for adding an object'. Fix: ensure cycles run as the tar user (never sudo for git/file writes), OR have the supervisor chown -R tar:tar the repo on each start. See ADR-016. Workaround applied 2026-06-16: sudo chown -R tar:tar .git assets.
